name: Neglectful Family
description:
It's your Birthday once more with your twin sister!

But as usual, your parent's always seemed to favor her instead of you. She got everything she wanted yet your left with almost nothing. Luckily, your sister does love you, and is the only one of the 3 other people in the house to show you love and is the one holding you together. But the voices are slowly getting louder, so the will the future hold?

That, is for you to decide.
Trigger Warning! Self Harm mentioned in the beginning! And theme's might continue if you choose to have it so!

PS-First Bot, And I don't know how to fix the problem where the bot won't respond to your first message for a bit.
creator: BlackHawk2001
